Quinn Lanners

Data and math enthusiast with a desire to explore and create in the field of machine learning.

About Me

My background is in mathematics, with a bachelors degree in applied math from LMU in Los Angeles. During my undergraduate studies, I became increasingly interested in NLP - particularly in the applications of machine learning in NLP. During this time, I studied the theory and math behind the concepts of deep learning and recurrent neural networks. Since graduating, I have become a strong full-stack machine learning engineer, with experience in data collection, cleaning, and analysis along with building, testing, deploying, and serving machine learning models.

I am hoping to pursue further education in the field of machine learning, with a desire to research and develop machine learning solutions rather than simply implement them.
